title: Reading List: Articles to Explore
drDigitalIntro:
Reading List is for articles you want to read later.
• Bookmarks are for sites you return to often; Reading List is for later reading.
• Add an interesting article now, and open it when you have time.
• Saved articles can even be read offline.

playgroundTask.goal: Save an article to read later

steps.say: Here's an article worth saving for later. First go to dailynews.example and press Enter.
No time to read it now? Click 📖 Reading List to save this article for later.

drDigitalSuccess: You saved the article to your Reading List — your 'read it later' pile. It'll be waiting when you have time.
drDigitalHint: Go to the news site first, then click the 📖 Reading List button in the action bar to save it.
